name: Green Brick Partners, Inc.
business: Green Brick Partners, Inc. is a diversified homebuilding and land development company that acquires and develops land, builds homes through seven brands, and provides title, mortgage, and insurance agency services to homebuyers.

exposures.sentence: Green Brick Partners, Inc. and its subsidiaries (Green Brick, the Company, we or us) is a diversified homebuilding and land development company.
Our insurance agency operations serve as an agency for providing home, auto, and other personal insurance policy options to buyers of homes we sell.
In 2024, we launched GRBK Mortgage our wholly-owned subsidiary.
